faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Learn more about Seedance AI video generator

items.title: What is Seedance AI video generator and how does it work?
items.description: Seedance gives you access to ByteDance's advanced AI video creation technology. Simply describe your video idea in text, and Seedance 1.0 will generate high-quality 1080p videos with cinematic aesthetics, multi-shot storytelling capabilities, and precise motion control.

items.title: What makes Seedance different from other AI video tools?
items.description: Seedance offers unique features: native multi-shot narrative generation, visual consistency across shot transitions, wide dynamic range for capturing subtle expressions, diverse style support from photorealism to cyberpunk, and precise control over multi-agent interactions and camera movements.

items.title: What types of videos can I create with Seedance?
items.description: Seedance supports a wide range of video types: marketing videos, social media content, educational materials, product demonstrations, animated stories, music videos, concept art, and cinematic scenes. With multi-shot storytelling and 1080p quality, the AI adapts to any creative vision with professional-grade results.

items.title: Are there any limitations to the free Seedance video generator?
items.description: While free Seedance provides access to advanced 1080p video generation and multi-shot storytelling capabilities, premium users enjoy unlimited generations, longer video durations, priority processing, and additional features like custom styles and batch processing. Free users can create cinematic videos with reasonable usage limits.

items.title: How long does it take to generate videos with Seedance?
items.description: Seedance video generation typically takes 2-5 minutes for standard 1080p videos, depending on complexity and multi-shot requirements. The AI processes your prompt, creates the video sequence with cinematic aesthetics, and applies advanced rendering for professional-grade results. Premium users get priority processing for faster generation.

items.title: Can I customize the style and quality of generated videos?
items.description: Yes! Seedance offers extensive customization options with style versatility from photorealism to cyberpunk aesthetics. You can specify video style, camera angles, lighting, mood, color palette, and motion characteristics in your prompts. The AI understands detailed creative direction and produces 1080p videos with cinematic quality matching your exact vision.

items.title: Is my content secure when using Seedance?
items.description: Absolutely. Seedance employs industry-leading security measures to protect your content and prompts. We follow strict privacy protocols and never use your personal projects to train models or share content with third parties. Your creative work and multi-shot video projects remain completely private.

items.title: How do I get started with Seedance?
items.description: Getting started with Seedance is simple! Just click the 'Generate Video' button, describe your video idea in the prompt box, and watch as AI creates your professional 1080p video with cinematic aesthetics. No complex setup required - start creating amazing multi-shot videos immediately.

items.title: What video formats and resolutions does Seedance support?
items.description: Seedance supports multiple formats including MP4, MOV, and WebM. Videos are generated in professional 1080p resolution by default, delivering cinematic quality with multi-shot storytelling capabilities. All videos are optimized for web sharing, social media, and professional use with wide dynamic range and style versatility.

items.title: Can I use Seedance generated videos for commercial purposes?
items.description: Yes! Videos created with Seedance can be used for commercial purposes, including marketing, advertising, social media, and business presentations. With professional-grade 1080p quality and cinematic aesthetics, your videos are ready for any commercial application. Premium plans offer extended commercial licensing and additional usage rights for enterprise applications.
